name: The Silver Key Gate
descriptionTemplate: Tawil obtains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. Place 1 {Silver Key Dawn} into hand. When Tawil consumes Arithmetica, the Keyflare gained +50%.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Tawil gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. Place 1 {Silver Key Dawn} into hand. When Tawil consumes Arithmetica, Keyflare gained increases by 50%. After Tawil unleashes Exalt, all Awakeners' Command Cards this turn gain [Arg2]% Final DMG bonus, and the next Command Card played by another Awakener triggers once more.
